Boutique Luxury · Ulcinj, Montenegro

Your Peaceful Escape
Above the Adriatic

Comfortable sea-view rooms, an outdoor pool and genuine Montenegrin hospitality — just minutes from Ulcinj's historic Old Town and beach.

Book Your Stay Explore Rooms
Discover

“A home above the sea, run by a family who remembers your name.”

Our Story

Mediterranean warmth, crafted by hand

Hotel Kleopatra has welcomed guests to the hills of Ulcinj since the year 2000. Run by the Molla family, this intimate 25-room hotel blends Mediterranean charm with the warmth of Montenegrin hospitality — where every returning guest is greeted like an old friend.

Mornings begin with the shimmer of light on the Adriatic and the scent of the sea drifting through your balcony doors. Days unfold slowly — a swim in the pool, a stroll through the cobbled lanes of the Old Town, an evening that lingers over traditional cuisine and good company.

Just a 7-minute walk from Mala Plaza beach and minutes from Ulcinj's historic fortress, Kleopatra is a peaceful refuge perched above the coast — comfortable, unpretentious and unmistakably personal.

7 min
to Mala Plaza beach

to Old Town

Accommodation

Rooms designed for restful days

Every room at Hotel Kleopatra opens to the sea. Soft linens, natural light and a private balcony — your sanctuary above the Adriatic.

Sea View

Comfort Double Room

from
€75/n

Sea view for two

A bright, air-conditioned room with a king bed, private balcony and sweeping Adriatic views. Satellite TV, fridge and en-suite shower complete your stay.

The Experience

Every comfort, considered

From the first morning coffee to the last star above the sea, nothing is left to chance. This is hospitality that anticipates.

Gallery

Moments by the Adriatic

A glimpse of the light, the water and the quiet luxury that awaits.

Dining

A table with a view to remember

Our restaurant is the heart of Hotel Kleopatra — a place where the day's freshest ingredients become simple, beautiful meals. Traditional Montenegrin recipes meet the flavours of the wider Mediterranean, served on a terrace where the sea stretches endlessly before you.

Breakfast Buffet

Sunrise spreads of fresh pastries, local fruit and strong coffee.

Mediterranean Cuisine

Grilled catch, olive oil and herbs straight from the coast.

Local & Seasonal

Produce from Montenegrin farms and the morning markets.

Al Fresco Evenings

Dine beneath string lights as the sky turns gold.

Reserve a Table
Location

Above Ulcinj, at the edge of the sea

Perfectly placed between the historic Old Town and the long golden beaches — everything you came for is within easy reach.

Hotel Kleopatra

Ulcinj Old Town

1.1 km

14 min walk · Historic Landmark

A centuries-old fortress town crowning the coast, with stone lanes, cafés and unforgettable views.

Mala Plaza Beach

0.8 km

10 min walk · City Beach

The beloved main beach of Ulcinj — golden sand and the warm, shallow Adriatic at your doorstep.

Long Beach (Velika Plaža)

6 km

10 min drive · 13 km Beach

One of the longest sandy beaches in Europe, a wild expanse of dunes and endless horizon.

Ada Bojana Island

11 km

18 min drive · River Island

A triangular river island formed by the Bojana River delta, famous for wooden restaurants and nudist beaches.

Ulcinj Marina & Seafront

0.6 km

8 min walk · Dining Quarter

Seafood grills, rooftop cocktails and live music unfold along the lively seafront each evening.

Liberty Monument

0.5 km

7 min walk · Monument

Iconic monument overlooking the sea, dedicated to Ulcinj's independence — a landmark visible from the hotel.

Guest Love
8.0

out of 10 · 178 reviews

Loved by travellers the world over

Our greatest pride isn't the view — it's the guests who return year after year, and the friends they send our way. Here is what they share.

Reserve Direct

Your Adriatic escape begins here

Book directly with us for the best available rate, flexible terms and a personal welcome from the Kleopatra family.

  • Best rate — guaranteed
  • No booking fees
  • Priority room selection
  • Complimentary welcome drink

Tell us your dates — we'll confirm availability personally.

Letters from the coast

Seasonal offers, quiet-season escapes and stories from Ulcinj — a few times a year, never more.
